The LEFT action moved the blocks from cols 24-28 to cols 19-23, and the UP action moved the blocks from rows 30-34 to rows 25-29.
So the blocks can move UP from rows 30-34 to rows 25-29. The cross is at rows 31-32, which is below the blocks.
Let me check the segmentation to confirm the block position and see if the cross is still visible.

</parameter>
</function>
